title: Conversational Editing Workflow
description: A Prompt Atlas theme testing mask-free conversational image editing: preserving most of a scene while applying sequential semantic changes.

zh-CN.title: 多轮对话式编辑工作流
zh-CN.description: 测试免 mask 的多轮对话式图像编辑：在连续语义修改中保留大部分场景、布局和视觉身份。
